features.label: WebRTC web API (RTCPeerConnection)

patches.author: Byron Campen
patches.subject: Remove the cache-clearing side effect of TS_NONE.

patches.author: Byron Campen
patches.subject: Fire closed updates for transports that are torn down, even if they were never active.

patches.author: Philipp Hancke
patches.subject: fix webrtc-stats transportId references

patches.author: Daniel Holbert
patches.subject: Use 'std::make_unique' for allocation (instead of 'new') for std::unique_ptr-typed variables, in dom/media/webrtc/.

patches.author: Daniel Holbert
patches.subject: Use MakeRefPtr to do allocation for more RefPtr variables in dom/media/webrtc/.

patches.author: Daniel Holbert
patches.subject: Use MakeRefPtr to do allocation for various RefPtr variables in dom/media/webrtc/.

patches.author: Jeff Muizelaar
patches.subject: Enable transport-cc for audio codecs;

patches.author: Jeff Muizelaar
patches.subject: Avoid sending null data to NewArrayBufferWithUserOwnedContents()

features.summary: Work on the public WebRTC API pages use (RTCPeerConnection, RTCDataChannel) — fixes to connection teardown and data-channel worker lifetimes, exposing the default audio/video codecs, enabling transport-wide congestion control for audio, and general modernisation.

features.label: Connection transport (ICE / DTLS)

patches.author: Daniel Holbert
patches.subject: Use 'MakeUnique' for allocation (instead of 'new') for UniquePtr-typed variables, in dom/media/webrtc/.

patches.author: Manuel Bucher
patches.subject: Move originAttributes to socket base class nsASocketHandler

patches.author: Anna Weine
patches.subject: Implement RTCTransportStats.tlsVersion/dtlsCipher/srtpCipher

patches.author: Philipp Hancke
patches.subject: implement (some of) RTCTransportStats

patches.author: Alex Franchuk
patches.subject: Add more IPCMessageUtils specializations for STL types

patches.author: Byron Campen
patches.subject: Make this mainthread only.

features.summary: Improvements to the WebRTC connection layer (ICE/DTLS) — richer connection statistics such as TLS version, cipher and candidate details, plus threading and ownership clean-ups.

features.label: libwebrtc integration

patches.author: az
patches.subject: Part 6: Integrate H.264 FMTP parser usage into Media Capabilities and WebrtcGmpVideoCodec support functions

patches.author: az
patches.subject: Part 2: Improve accuracy of Media Capabilities support queries based on media resolution/framerate. Uses PDM/PEMFactory checks to more easily allow additional verification in the future.

patches.author: Byron Campen
patches.subject: Bug 2040478 (MOZ) - Remove the CallBasicStats override.

patches.author: Chun-Min Chang
patches.subject: Map webrtc::H264Level to H264_LEVEL by enumerator name

patches.author: Jeff Muizelaar
patches.subject: Configure audio send stream bitrate range and BWE allocation.

features.summary: Glue between Firefox and the upstream libwebrtc library — better gating of hardware H.264 encode/decode, audio bitrate and bandwidth configuration, and more accurate Media Capabilities answers for real-time codecs.

features.label: Session negotiation (SDP)

patches.author: Daniel Holbert
patches.subject: Use MakeUnique instead of 'new' to populate UniquePtrs in dom/media/webrtc/{jsep,sdp}.

patches.author: Daniel Holbert
patches.subject: Change SdpAttributeList::SetAttribute() and its callers to transfer ownership using UniquePtr.

patches.author: Daniel Holbert
patches.subject: Change SdpAttribute::Clone() to provide the clone in a UniquePtr.

patches.author: Daniel Holbert
patches.subject: In SdpAttributeList concrete classes, store attributes in UniquePtrs instead of raw pointers.

features.summary: Refactoring of the SDP layer (the text format that negotiates a call's media) toward safer memory ownership, with formatting and lint clean-up.

features.label: Negotiation engine (JSEP)

patches.author: Byron Campen
patches.subject: Stop using FindUnassociatedTransceiver on application m-sections.

patches.author: Byron Campen
patches.subject: Only attempt to associate transceivers when remote m-section is receiving.

patches.author: serge-sans-paille
patches.subject: Activate performance-inefficient-string-concatenation clang-tidy check

features.summary: Fixes in the call-negotiation engine (JSEP) around when media sections are associated, plus a code-quality check.

features.label: WebRTC

patches.author: az
patches.subject: Part 8: Reject WebRTC MediaCapabilities H.264 queries when resolution/framerate exceeds the requested level

patches.author: az
patches.subject: Part 5: Add H.264 FMTP parser and GTests

features.summary: Cross-cutting WebRTC work — an H.264 format-parameter parser with tests, and rejecting Media Capabilities H.264 queries whose resolution or frame rate exceed what the encoder supports.
